features: Carex Dermacare Sensitive Antibacterial Hand Wash: With natural moisturisers to help leave hands feeling soft and smooth, the Dermacare liquid hand soap enhances the skin's natural pH and gently cleanses while removing dirt and germs
Moisturising Action: Carex experts have developed a formula made with light moisturising ingredients and gentle cleansers to help leave your hands feeling hygienically clean and protected

Protects Against Germs: With a soft fragrance and suitable for sensitive and delicate skin, Carex Sensitive Antibacterial hand soap is effective yet gentle in helping to prevent the spread of germs when washing hands

Packaging May Vary: Due to huge demand and a pump shortage at the moment, Carex hand wash may arrive as a refill format without a pump. We’d like to encourage you to save your previous hand wash pump and reuse this with your refill pack

The Dermacare Range: The Carex Dermacare liquid hand wash range is designed to clean, care and protect hands whatever the occasion. Whether you're cooking for your family or you've returned from a hike, Carex know you'll want to protect your hands
description: Product Description Packaging may vary Keep hands feeling smooth and clean with Carex Dermacare Antibacterial Hand Wash for sensitive skin. Expertly formulated to be kind to skin with natural moisturisers that help leave hands feeling soft and smooth, the Dermacare liquid hand soap enhances the skin's natural pH and gently cleanses while removing dirt and germs. With over 25 years experience, Carex priority at Carex is to protect the skin on your hands and the hands of your loved ones. Whether you've come back from a shopping spree or you're entertaining guests at home, Carex know you'll be washing your hands countless times throughout the day. Carex Dermacare hand wash soap formula with trusted antibacterial protection doesn't just clean your hands but cares for them too. With a gentle fragrance ideal for delicate skin, Carex hand cleanser for sensitive skin offers all round protection for healthy, happy hands. As the UK's number 1 hand wash brand, Carex want to care for your hands and the environment, so we've taken care to ensure Carex eco bottles and pumps are 100 Percent recyclable and reusable. Once you've finished your hand wash, simply refill your bottle using Carex liquid soap refill packs and reuse your pump to help reduce the amount of plastic used. We’ve teamed up with Terracycle to make recycling Carex pumps and eco pouches that bit easier. Now available in multipacks of 6, Carex antibacterial hand wash is suitable for the whole family, so you can get on with your day without any worry. Uk’s No.1 hand wash brand. Source: GB – Total W&B, Spend, Total Market, 6th Sept 2020 – Kantar Box Contains 6 x Carex Liquid Soap Soothing 250ml
